# DM Electricals & Installation

> Licensed electrical contractor in Nairobi, Kenya — installations, CCTV, electric fence, fire & alarm systems, solar integration, generators, smart home, emergency repairs, and electrical products. Based on Mwihoko Road, Kasarani.

DM Electricals serves homes, businesses, and industrial clients across Nairobi with ERC-aligned work, transparent pricing, and 24/7 emergency response. The main site is a full visual brochure; **SEO landing pages** (below) cover each core service, product line, and neighbourhood with unique URLs, FAQ markup, and internal linking hubs — use the **sitemap** for the complete list.

**Primary location:** Mwihoko Road, Kasarani, Nairobi, Kenya  
**Service area:** Greater Nairobi County; Kiambu & Ruiru by arrangement  
**Phones:** +254 799 762 232 | +254 762 748 694 (Kenya)  
**Email:** info@dmelectricals.com

**Search topics we address:** electrician Nairobi, emergency electrician near me Nairobi, verified fundi wiring Nairobi, electric fence installer Nairobi, CCTV installation Nairobi, house rewiring Nairobi, solar installation Nairobi, generator changeover Nairobi, socket repair Nairobi, water heater installation Nairobi, smart home electrician Nairobi, industrial electrical Nairobi, MCB tripping fault finding.

- [Home / full site](https://dmelectricals.com/): Services, products, projects, testimonials, contact, WhatsApp.
